briefs.title: BC Development Charge Instalment Rules Grandfathered for Elections Made Before Jan 1, 2026
briefs.summary: BC updated its rules for paying development charges (fees developers pay to local governments) in instalments. Developers who chose the instalment option and made their first payment before Jan 1, 2026 will continue under the old payment rules.
briefs.action_required: If you elected instalment payments and paid your first instalment before Jan 1, 2026, confirm you follow the old payment schedule going forward.

key_dates.label: BC Development Charge Instalment amended rules take effect
